business.name: Meridian
business.oneLineDescription: Meridian is a landscape design-build studio crafting singular residential gardens across Austin and the Texas Hill Country.

hero.imageAlt: Dusk view of a sculpted courtyard garden with a reflecting pool and limestone terrace
hero.headline: Gardens made to be lived in
hero.subhead: A design-build studio for singular residential landscapes across the Texas Hill Country.

projects.name: Tarrytown Courtyard
projects.summary: A walled 1930s lot reimagined as a series of outdoor rooms — a limestone dining terrace, a still reflecting pool, and layered native planting that softens the architecture.

cover.alt: Limestone terrace beside a still reflecting pool at dusk

gallery.alt: Reflecting pool at blue hour under an uplit oak
gallery.caption: The reflecting pool at dusk

gallery.alt: Limestone dining terrace with a built-in bench and pergola
gallery.caption: Dining terrace

gallery.alt: Native planting bed with regional grasses and perennials
gallery.caption: Native planting

gallery.alt: Board-formed concrete pavers through the courtyard
gallery.caption: Entry sequence

projects.name: Hill Terrace
projects.summary: Cut into a steep Hill Country slope, a cascade of terraces steps down to a shaded lounge and a fire garden with long views west.

cover.alt: Stepped stone terraces descending a wooded slope at golden hour

gallery.alt: Fire garden with low seating and a steel fire feature at dusk
gallery.caption: The fire garden

gallery.alt: Board-formed concrete retaining walls with integrated steps
gallery.caption: Terrace walls

gallery.alt: Long view west over the tree canopy from the upper terrace
gallery.caption: The view west

gallery.alt: Architectural lighting washing a limestone wall after dark
gallery.caption: Night lighting

projects.name: Clarksville Modern
projects.summary: A restrained, architectural front and back garden for a modern infill home — crushed granite, corten edges, and a disciplined palette of three plants repeated with intent.

cover.alt: Minimalist courtyard with corten steel planters and crushed granite

gallery.alt: Corten steel planter with an architectural agave against white render
gallery.caption: Corten & agave

gallery.alt: Crushed granite courtyard with a single specimen tree
gallery.caption: The courtyard

gallery.alt: Repeated grass planting along a clean concrete walk
gallery.caption: Planting rhythm

projects.name: Barton Creek Retreat
projects.summary: A whole-property landscape for a hillside residence — an infinity pool, native meadow restoration, and an oak-shaded arrival court.

cover.alt: Infinity-edge pool overlooking a native meadow and distant hills

gallery.alt: Infinity pool edge dissolving into the meadow beyond
gallery.caption: Infinity edge

gallery.alt: Restored native meadow in bloom with mown paths
gallery.caption: Meadow restoration

gallery.alt: Arrival court shaded by heritage live oaks
gallery.caption: Arrival court

gallery.alt: Outdoor kitchen and shaded dining pavilion
gallery.caption: Dining pavilion

projects.name: Pemberton Garden
projects.summary: A quiet, layered garden for a historic home — a restrained restoration that lets mature trees and a soft perennial understory carry the scene.

cover.alt: Layered perennial garden beneath mature trees at a historic home

gallery.alt: Soft perennial understory in morning light
gallery.caption: Perennial understory

gallery.alt: Stone path winding beneath an established canopy
gallery.caption: Garden path

gallery.alt: Shaded seating nook with a limestone bench
gallery.caption: Seating nook

servicePhases.title: Concept & design
servicePhases.body: We begin with how you want to live outside. Site study, grading, and planting come together into a considered plan and renderings you can walk through before a shovel moves.

servicePhases.title: Build & craft
servicePhases.body: Our own crews execute the plan — stonework, water, structures, drainage, irrigation, and lighting — held to a level of finish most firms sub out and lose control of.

servicePhases.title: Planting & delivery
servicePhases.body: We plant with an eye to how the garden reads in five years, not five weeks — then hand over a living space, with a care plan to keep it that way.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: A conversation on site to understand the property, the architecture, and how you want to use it.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Concept, master plan, and renderings — refined with you until the garden feels inevitable.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: A detailed scope and investment, transparent and fixed before we build.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Our crews construct every element, managed by the designer who drew it.

steps.title: Handover & care
steps.description: We deliver the finished landscape with a stewardship plan for the years ahead.

about.imageAlt: Portrait of the Meridian studio principal in a finished garden
about.heading: A small studio, by intent
about.body: Meridian is a landscape design-build studio based in Austin. We take on a limited number of residential projects a year so that a principal is on every site, and every detail is drawn and built by the same hands. We work in native and adapted plants, honest materials, and restraint — landscapes that belong to the Hill Country and get better with every season.
